story:
Suffering Builds Character started as a team of mechanically gifted OTPs in the beginning of Overwatch 2; their mission was simple; try to bring back greater times.
Now, Suffering Builds Character has returned, to bring back a previous golden age of mechanics and aim. There's a reason you don't see names like Fusah, Rose, Hauntr, Zac, Lolz, Receptioncells anymore.
We're here to change that.
